faqs.question: Does Medhavi Skills University provide placement support?
faqs.answer: Yes, Medhavi Skills University has a robust placement cell that collaborates with industry partners to offer placement opportunities to students. The programmes are designed to align with the industry requirements, ensuring students are well-prepared for their careers.

faqs.question: Is MSU approved by UGC?
faqs.answer: Yes, Medhavi Skills University (MSU) is a UGC-approved university. It is established under the Medhavi Skills University Act, 2021, and complies with the norms set by the University Grants Commission  (UGC).

college_info.intro: Medhavi Skills University popular programmes are BTech Computer Science Engineering, BSc Hospitality & Hotel Management, MBA, BBA, BCA, BPharm, BSc Biotechnology, and BSc Nursing. The university follows an Industry-Led Learning Model and hence provides practical learning opportunities to students. The university is known to offer on the job training opportunities to students. The university focuses on a competency-based evaluation process rather than purely theoretical examinations. The college provides scholarships to students which ensures that all students have equal opportunity to complete their education at this university. BTech students can become Engineers and can also join various top companies at top positions. Below mentioned are some of the Medhavi Skills University courses and their respective eligibility and Medhavi Skills University fee:

placements.overview: Medhavi Skills University placements 2025 will be updated here once out. Medhavi Skills University has a robust placement cell that collaborates with various industry partners to offer placement opportunities. The programmes are designed to align with various industry requirements, ensuring students are well-prepared for their careers. The university is known for its 100% placement assistance.

faqs.answer: A:    The Industry-Led Learning Model at the Medhavi Skills University is an approach to education and training that aligns academic programmes with the knowledge, skills, and competencies demanded by industries. It emphasizes collaboration between educational institutions and industry partners to create a curriculum, provide hands-on experience, and foster employability.
faqs.question: What is the Industry Led Learning Model at Medhavi Skills University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Medhavi Skills University offers UG and PG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Engineering, Management, and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, BBA, BCA, BPharm, BSc, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the university offers MBA and other courses to students.

faqs.answer: A:    Medhavi Skill University MSc eligibility criteria is merit-based. To be eligible for admission into this course, students must have completed a BSc in Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Microbiology/ Botany/ Zoology/ Life Sciences/ Biomedical Sciences/ Chemistry or BPharm. The degree must be from a recognised institute/ university. Further, students need to appear for MSAT. Eligible students can apply online for the course by filling out the application form.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MSc at Medhavi Skills University?

faqs.answer: A:    Medhavi Skills University admission is primarily merit-based. However, students need to sit for the Medhavi Scholarship and Aptitude Test (MSAT). Further, if required, the university may conduct additional selection rounds, such as personal interviews. It is important that students fulfil the minimum educational qualification of the desired course to be eligible for admission. Aspirants can apply online at the official website of the university.
faqs.question: Can I join Medhavi Skills Univeristy without entrance exam?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Optometry - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: MSU sikkim is a very nice .

review_content.Placements: More than 60% of students were placed in our course. The highest is 3 LPA the lowest is 1.5 LPA and the average is 2 LPA. There are many companies where students get internships More than 60%. They provide 100% internship to the students and they are a trusted university among all.
review_content.Infrastructure: So basically I'm from a medical background. So the Wi-Fi is free and the lab is very nice as well as the classroom but the library is small They have ever facilities such as a canteen mess as well as medical facilities. Medhavi Skill University provides an annual sports fest also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Optometry - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Being a Medhavian student.

review_content.Placements: Recently, BBA and MBA seniors got their placements in good companies in Bangalore. The lowest is 20,000, and the highest is 40,000. Top recruiting companies include Apollo, Aditya Birla Group, etc. Currently, I’m just a newbie student, and 10-15 students got their internships. Top roles such as music as a career and, as a non-science student, you could be able to role in the medical background by doing a diploma or ECCT in the science background.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is installed in every department and building. The average MS is 40 MSN. Lab facilities are really good, and there are radiology machines to understand it. The library is small, but there are lots of knowledgeable books. About the mess, not hostel people, but those who are not opting for hostels are also eating in the mess at the college, as it’s really tasty, affordable, and delicious. The mess is really delicious and can compete with really good colleges in India. As for medical facilities, there is a polyclinic in our school to provide medications, and our health skills teacher is a nurse.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. In Medical Laboratory Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Future ready Medhavi, where skills meet your needs.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 250 students were placed in our course this year, including me. The highest package was 62,000, but with the scholarship benefits, its only 49,000 per semester of 6 months, or 98,000 per year. The companies that recruit for the courses available are the Ferns, multi-specialty hospitals, Reliance, etc. Recently all of our seniors went for their internships from various courses, like in the Mayfair hotel and resort, the STNM hospital here in Sikkim, etc. The roles offered in our courses are the designed posts that are required for the company.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This is a new college.

review_content.Placements: I am a student at BRIT. We have a total of 80 students in our course. I have no idea about the placement percentage, but some got the highest packages, ranging from 30 lacs to 5 lacs per annum. Manipal Hospital, Fortis Healthcare, and diagnostic centers recruit from our college. BRIT students have not completed their 6th semester, so I don't have the actual placement details. Top roles include radiologist and radiology technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is segregated into 5 places. The classes are well-colored with smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library designed to facilitate learning in a conducive environment. Medhavi provides hostels for both girls and boys to ensure a comfortable and secure environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. In Medical Laboratory Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: "Skill University: Learning Beyond the Classroom"

review_content.Placements: The student need to obtain 70% to be eligible for placements. Many companies and hospitals came to our college for placement like hotel Hyatt and central research hospital. The highest package offered was 3.4 lakhs per annum by hotel Hyatt for hotel management course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is quite small in our college and the books are very less. Everyday in the last class we have the club activity and sports activities. Nss and other club are available. The classrooms are also bit too small and congested and but others are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend joining this college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 30%of students got placed in our course. The salary offered ranges between Rs. 10,000 - Rs. 15,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Private CT scan, MRI, and Ultrasound scanning centers. Our college doesn't provide internship opportunities for our course. Top roles offered are skills development, communication building, hotel management, hospitality, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms are equipped with projectors for enhanced learning. The Wi-Fi speed is 10 Mbps. Our college has 2 libraries and it contains sufficient course books. Libraries have good fans and lights. The food served in the mess is hygienic. Medical facilities are good. A playground is not available for sports and games. Our college provides us with indoor games like table tennis, etc. Our college provides us with all musical instruments.

admission_overview.college_name: Medhavi Skills University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Medhavi Skills University admission 2025is merit-based for both undergraduate and postgraduate courses. Students can enrol by applying online at the official website of the university. The university accepts applicants based on their performance in the last qualifying exam.Medhavi Skills Universityoffers a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate courses in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Management, Nursing, and more. Additionally, students can also pursue diploma courses at the university. Students interested in joining the university can read the following article to know all about the university's offered programmes, their eligibility criteria, and the admission process.

Students seeking to join the university need to follow the entire process of admission before applying. The university offers its courses in full-time mode. Check out the Medhavi Skills University admission 2025 details below:
Particulars
Medhavi Skill University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Offline
Application status 2025
Programmes Offered
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG & Diploma
Popular programmes
BTech CSE| BSc| MBA| BBA| BCA| BPharm| BSc Biotechnology| BSc Nursing

Medhavi Skills University course admissionis subject to the preset admission criteria. Candidates looking to enrol in the UG courses offered at the university need to pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Similarly, PG admissions require students to complete graduation. Students must fulfil both the admission criteria of the desired course. Additonally, students need to provide the MSAT (Medhavi Scholarship & Aptitude Test) scores as well. The table below showcases the eligibility and selection criteria for popularMedhavi Skills University courses:

The admission procedure for Medhavi Skills University includes several steps from application to selection followed by admission confirmation. Candidates interested in joining the university can apply online for the desired course at the official website of the university. Students can first check whether they satisfy the admission criteria of the course they seek to join. Eligible students can follow the steps listed below to complete the Medhavi Skills University admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested candidates can apply for the desired programme by visiting the official website of the university and filling out the application form. To submit the form, students must provide the required information and documents along with paying the application fees.
Step 2: Selection Process

reviews.review_heading: MSU sikkim is a very nice .
reviews.review_text: So basically I'm from a medical background. So the Wi-Fi is free and the lab is very nice as well as the classroom but the library is small They have ever facilities such as a canteen mess as well as medical facilities. Medhavi Skill University provides an annual sports fest also.

reviews.review_heading: Being a Medhavian student.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is installed in every department and building. The average MS is 40 MSN. Lab facilities are really good, and there are radiology machines to understand it. The library is small, but there are lots of knowledgeable books. About the mess, not hostel people, but those who are not opting for hostels are also eating in the mess at the college, as it’s really tasty, affordable, and delicious. The mess is really delicious and can compete with really good colleges in India. As for medical faciliti...

reviews.review_heading: Future ready Medhavi, where skills meet your needs.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities are so many and so well that it makes our learning fun, whether it be a computer lab with an interactive board or projectors in all of the classrooms with proper Wi-Fi facilities. And also a library for the students to read the books of their interests. I have not been in the hostel but hearing from my friends, the hostel's room quality is very good with 24/7 running water, and the food of the mess is also fresh and tasty.
We have a proper dedication centre and proper sports equip...

reviews.review_heading: This is a new college.
reviews.review_text: Our college is segregated into 5 places. The classes are well-colored with smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library designed to facilitate learning in a conducive environment. Medhavi provides hostels for both girls and boys to ensure a comfortable and secure environment.

reviews.review_heading: "Skill University: Learning Beyond the Classroom"
reviews.review_text: The library is quite small in our college and the books are very less. Everyday in the last class we have the club activity and sports activities. Nss and other club are available. The classrooms are also bit too small and congested and but others are good.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms are equipped with projectors for enhanced learning. The Wi-Fi speed is 10 Mbps. Our college has 2 libraries and it contains sufficient course books. Libraries have good fans and lights. The food served in the mess is hygienic. Medical facilities are good. A playground is not available for sports and games. Our college provides us with indoor games like table tennis, etc. Our college provides us with all musical instruments.

reviews.review_heading: It is really a good college with hardworking faculty members, but the campus is small.
reviews.review_text: Being a new university, the campus was not very big but had good hostel facilities. There were two different campuses of this university in two different places in Sikkim. This university also had a sports arena for outdoor sports activities and an indoor arena for indoor sports.

individual_reviews.title: The campus is good and ecofriendly. Fully covered with different types of plants and flowers.

content.Placements: The highest Package is 20LPA and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters are VERKa and Milk Plant. 6+CGPA is required to sit for placements. Top roles offered are Agriculture Scientists, Horticulturist, Farm Manger, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the college are good. All the equipments are available for agricultural practices. Tools and machinery are present in the college. Facilities in the hostel are quite good and food quality is also good. We have security guards and proper CCTV cameras.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for beginners.

content.Placements: Many companies from Chandigarh visited the college and offered various jobs as per student's interest and ability. Seniors got placed in Infosys, Chandigarh with a great salary package. Girls should feel more beneficial as they are offering scholarships of 1 lacs to them.
content.Infrastructure: I have visited many colleges before my admission, and I must say that this college has the best infrastructure among all colleges in the city. The campus is spacious with all the facilities required for students. You will not feel bored on the campus as it provides a Wi-Fi facility for both teachers as well as students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A good campus life with decent facilities and helpful staff.

content.Placements: In our batch, around 70-75% students got placed through campus drives. The highest package offered was around 6-7 LPA, the lowest was close to 2 LPA, and the average package stayed around 3-3.5 LPA. Companies like HCL, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Byju's, JustDial and a few good local firms visited our campus. Almost 40-50% students got internships as well, mainly in companies like HCL (training), local IT firms, and manufacturing units. The top roles offered in our course were mainly Software Trainee, Network Support, Sales Executive, Technician, and Junior Engineer, depending on the branch and skill level.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Ramgarhia Polytechnic College.

content.Placements: Placements are not provided by this college. There is nothing related to placements, and you will have to find jobs on your own. There are no internships. NIELIT Guwahati offers various UG, PG and certification level programmes in various streams such as IT and Software, Design and Animation etc. The Institute offers BCA, MSc and several certification courses as popular programmes that the candidates opt for.

review_summary.college_name: Echelon Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college for a technical course.

content.Placements: In my course, mostly 70% of students get placement. The highest package offered is 21 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Zomato, Microsoft, Wipro, and LinkedIn. Top roles offered by the companies are telecalling, web development, data analysis, and purchase assistance.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is so good, there are clean classes, well-hygiene washrooms, and an RO water service facility. There is Wi-Fi available in all classes, and the seminar halls are wide and have enough space for 200 students to be seated at once. Also, there are clean corridors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good in infrastructure, syllabus, and they conduct excellent training every semester.

content.Placements: Well, it's better not to hope for even a single percent from this college, as barely anyone gets selected on campus because barely any companies come, and even if they do, they pay too little. There is no such top recruiting company. If I named them, everybody would say they have heard about this company for the first time, and it’s too hard to find them on Google, too. The top role offered in my course is web development.
content.Infrastructure: Well, I will say that in terms of infrastructure, this is the best. It's so goated that multiple movies, web series, and ads are being shot here. Classrooms are well-equipped with centralized AC, smart boards, speakers, and Wi-Fi. The library is also well-spaced and has a lot of books and quite a space to study. The hostel is also the best according to infrastructure, and the mess food, I would say, is okayish. Hostels have good Wi-Fi and hot and cold showers, and a sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement support is decent. The placement cell brings companies with a reasonable profit range, and strong performers take good offers. The average package offered is aligned with industry standards. The top packages offered depend highly on our preparation. Workshops and mock interviews are the best.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The perfect hub of technology .

content.Placements: I'm pursuing B.Tech, and the academics are so good that most of the students get placement from campus. There are around 80 percent of students who get placement from the campus. The highest package is 50 LPA in my course. The top recruiting companies of my course are Google, Wipro, Accenture, Yahoo, Zomato, Swiggy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is overall good for Students. Our department has well-equipped labs, working project tools, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a decent library with enough books for reference. The hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, drinking water, and proper security.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the best budget-friendly colleges, with job opportunities, and a great environment.

content.Placements: One of the best campuses in Haryana to pursue B.Tech. Healthy environment and good jobs. The placement scenario for the CSE branch here is excellent. In our batch, I would say around 85-90 percent of students who sat for placements got placed. The college's placement cell works tirelessly from the third year itself. The salary packages are very encouraging. The highest package went to a remarkable 50.5 LPA (an exceptional off-campus placement), while the lowest is around 3.5 LPA. The average package for our CSE branch is comfortable between 5.5 LPA and 6 LPA, which is a fantastic start. Top recruiting companies visit our college.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for a technical course.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is so good, there are clean classes, well-hygiene washrooms, and an RO water service facility. There is Wi-Fi available in all classes, and the seminar halls are wide and have enough space for 200 students to be seated at once. Also, there are clean corridors.

reviews.review_heading: Good in infrastructure, syllabus, and they conduct excellent training every semester.
reviews.review_text: Well, I will say that in terms of infrastructure, this is the best. It's so goated that multiple movies, web series, and ads are being shot here. Classrooms are well-equipped with centralized AC, smart boards, speakers, and Wi-Fi. The library is also well-spaced and has a lot of books and quite a space to study. The hostel is also the best according to infrastructure, and the mess food, I would say, is okayish. Hostels have good Wi-Fi and hot and cold showers, and a sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

reviews.review_heading: The perfect hub of technology .
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is overall good for Students. Our department has well-equipped labs, working project tools, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a decent library with enough books for reference. The hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, drinking water, and proper security.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best budget-friendly colleges, with job opportunities, and a great environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is genuinely one of the best things about Echelon. For our CSE department, the computer labs are modern, fully air-conditioned, and equipped with the latest software and high-speed internet. The Wi-Fi coverage across the academic blocks and the library is reliable. Classrooms are all smart with projectors, which makes learning interactive. The central library is huge and has a massive collection of books and digital resources.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure and facility.
reviews.review_text: Echloan Institute of Technology in its first structure is very good whole campus is under CCTV surveillance. We have smart classrooms with centralise AC and free Wi-Fi service. Sports ground, basketball ground, cricket ground, and medical room are also available 24X7. Ambulance service is available. Gym facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Echelon is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is unique from others. There are three buildings or departments available for different things administration, library, and the academic block/building. The quality of hostel is good. Mess provides good quality food to us, and it's healthy for us. The medical and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and dissatisfied for some of facilities.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very large, and provides good space for classes. The ground is very big. There are very good sports facilities. Canteen facilities are very good in quality, and the prices are very affordable. The chairs and tables are well arranged.

reviews.review_heading: Echelon Institute - Top choice for Delhi NCR students.
reviews.review_text: Echelon Institute of Technology had a big, green, and modern campus spread over 17.5 acres in Faridabad. College had smart classrooms with A/C, more than 70 well-equipped labs, and a large library with more than 50,000 books and digital resources. There were good hostel facilities for boys and girls with shared and single room options. Students got Wi-Fi all over the campus, a cafeteria, gym, sports grounds (like cricket, volleyball, basketball, and football), and medical support for emergencies...

reviews.review_heading:
Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent infrastructure
.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, projectors, and high-speed Wi-Fi accessible across campus. The library is rich with technical books, journals, and digital resources. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with spacious rooms, 24/7 water and electricity, and decent security. The mess food is average but hygienic, while the canteen offers a variety of snacks and meals. Basic medical facilities with a first-aid center and a tie-up hospital are available for emergencies...

reviews.review_heading: Well-qualified faculty, industry-relevant curriculum, and supportive environment.
reviews.review_text: The institute spans 17.5 acres of lush, and has well-maintained grounds. Campus features centralized AC buildings, smart classrooms equipped with audio-visual aids, and robust Wi-Fi connectivity throughout. Well, over 70 laboratories and workshops support hands-on learning across disciplines, ranging from electronics, mechanical, and data Science to general computer labs. Library is an air-conditioned, separate block housing a rich collection, around 32,000-40,000+ books, 58 or more national/int...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members. It has decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure and facilities to support learning and overall development. Classrooms are spacious with projectors and WiFi access while the department has wellequipped laboratories including fluid mechanics thermodynamics CAD/CAM and workshop labs. Central library offers a wide collection of books journals and e resources. Hostel facilities are comfortable with furnished rooms 24/7 electricity WiFi and hygienic mess food. The canteen serves affordable meals and sn...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, infrastructure, placements, and hostel.
reviews.review_text: Echelon Institute of Technology offers modern infrastructure with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and an excellent library. The hostel is comfortable, safe, and student-friendly, making it a great environment for both learning and living. It is very good compared to others.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college with placements. All professors and facilities in this college are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, parking, and farewell events are available at my college. The classrooms have AC, and cleaning and maintenance are done regularly. The canteen charges Rs. 25 per plate, but the food is tasty, healthy, and worth the price. The college campus covers an area of 2km and has a no-smoking policy.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is really nice. Wi-Fi facility is also available.  Mess food is really delicious. It has a green campus. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors. There are decent sports grounds and indoor game facilities.
